mapper.insert: insert into room_campus_code (campus_account, code, expire_time) values (#{campusAccount}, #{code}, #{expireTime})
mapper.select: select id, campus_account as campusAccount, code, expire_time as expireTime, create_time as createTime from room_campus_code where campus_account = #{campusAccount} order by id desc limit 1
mapper.delete: delete from room_campus_code where expire_time < now()
